note: Event-level counts parsed from the local Klein appendix PDF and aggregated to state-year.
Deduplicated event-level fatalities and injuries used to distribute 2012-2014 state-year outcomes before calibration.
Annual killed and wounded totals were read from the paper figures rendered from the local PDF. The extracted yearly values sum exactly to the published 354 killed and 382 wounded totals.
Restrictive CCW and private-sale background-check variables are reconstructed from the Tufts-law panel to match the paper's categories as closely as possible.
1990, 2000, and 2008 anchors come from Census Table 229. 2008-2014 values use ACS actuals. 1991-1999 and 2001-2007 are linearly interpolated.
State-year age counts are summed directly from age-specific Census/NBER files and divided by annual total population from the core panel.
Uses beverage-type total ethanol per capita age 14 and older.
Matches the paper's proxy concept but not necessarily the exact original source file used by Gius.
Uses per capita personal income as the closest continuous historical state-year proxy for the paper's income control.
